articles.title: UK Visa Portal spilled thousands of applicants’ passports and selfies online — and hasn’t fixed the leak
articles.summary: The third-party website exposed applicants' sensitive documents as part of the U.K. visa application process. Instead of fixing the issue, the company sent attorneys.

articles.title: Edge AI Daily 早报（5月27日）
articles.summary: Anthropic Claude Mythos模型暴露全球金融系统漏洞，引发欧洲央行紧急会议；OpenAI GPT-5.6泄露显示150万token上下文窗口，预计6月发布；英伟达新一代AI芯片价格或将翻倍，供应链价值重构；微软Copilot Cowork存在文件泄露风险，攻击成功率100%。

articles.title: 别再惦记 SpaceX 的 IPO，眼下这两只新股更值得关注
articles.summary: 尽管投资者仍在等待SpaceX的公开募股，近期上市的Pattern Group和Ethos Technologies却展现出建设性的技术形态。

articles.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
articles.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.

articles.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
articles.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
